product_context: MOS is a broadcast industry protocol for communication between newsroom systems and media servers. BenchCore uses MOS for rundown integration.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not attempt to connect to or operate MOS protocol endpoints in production environments

product_context: OverDrive is a broadcast automation system for playout control. BenchCore integrates with OverDrive for command execution.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not execute OverDrive commands or control broadcast automation systems

product_context: Inception is a newsroom computer system (NRCS) used in broadcast production. BenchCore operates as a plugin within Inception.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not install or operate as a plugin in any newsroom system

product_context: NRCS refers to specific broadcast newsroom systems where BenchCore predicts rundown fields like story, item, and split.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim NRCS field prediction as general-purpose classification; limited to benchmark pattern

product_context: QuickCode is a shorthand keyword system in broadcast production for expanding shortcuts into full production cues.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim QuickCode expansion as general NLP understanding

product_context: *CG (character generator) and *OD (OverDrive) are specific command prefixes used in broadcast automation scripting.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim *CG/*OD validation as general command interpretation capability

product_context: CAM (camera), MIC (microphone), and CLIP are specific field types in broadcast rundown prediction.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim CAM/MIC/CLIP prediction as general object detection or audio processing

product_context: T5 transformer with TranX semantic parser and LoRA fine-tuning were evaluated for BenchCore's prediction pipeline (deferred).
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim T5/TranX/LoRA integration; this is a deferred architecture note, not an implemented capability

product_context: Green line and grommet are broadcast production terms referring to specific timing markers and physical cable management in control rooms.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim understanding of broadcast production terminology as general knowledge

product_context: DBLBOX is a production template for split-screen dual-box graphics in broadcast. It appears in production cue commands.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not claim DBLBOX template knowledge as general UI layout generation

product_context: BenchCore documentation includes MySQL installation and SQL backup import for customer database setup.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not perform MySQL restore or database automation; this is deferred with no live dependency

product_context: BenchCore documentation covers WSL installation for Windows-based development environments.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not automate WSL setup; platform-specific configuration is outside benchmark scope

product_context: BenchCore documentation describes enabling remote log tailing via SSH for OverDrive systems.
prevented_action: Agent_X must not execute SSH commands or access remote systems for log tailing
